sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16870" key="a)sfalti/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσφαλτίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-</foreign> priv., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφάλλω</foreign>) <sense id="n16870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not failing,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφόνδυλος ἀ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lowest</tr_> vertebra, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:179" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.179</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-τίτης</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
